ddls:
CREATE TABLE "devices" (
  "device_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each device */,
  "device_name" TEXT /* Name of the device */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of the device (e.g., router, switch) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the device */,
  "mac_address" TEXT /* MAC address of the device */,
  "device_model" TEXT /* Model of the device */,
  "device_vendor" TEXT /* Vendor of the device */,
  "device_firmware" TEXT /* Firmware version of the device */,
  "device_location" TEXT /* Physical location of the device */,
  "device_status" TEXT /* Current status of the device (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("device_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "flows" (
  "flow_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each flow */,
  "device_id" INTEGER /* ID of the device that transmitted the flow */,
  "source_ip" TEXT /* Source IP address of the flow */,
  "destination_ip" TEXT /* Destination IP address of the flow */,
  "protocol" TEXT /* Protocol used to transmit the flow (e.g., TCP, UDP) */,
  "flow_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the flow in seconds */,
  "source_port" INTEGER /* Source port of the flow */,
  "destination_port" INTEGER /* Destination port of the flow */,
  "flow_bandwidth" INTEGER /* Bandwidth used by the flow in bytes per second */,
  "flow_packets" INTEGER /* Number of packets in the flow */,
  "flow_bytes" INTEGER /* Total bytes transferred in the flow */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("flow_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_flows_device_id FOREIGN KEY ("device_id") REFERENCES devices ("device_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., administrator, analyst) */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last login timestamp of the user */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user (e.g., active, suspended) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "packet_analysis" (
  "analysis_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analysis result */,
  "packet_id" INTEGER /* ID of the packet analyzed */,
  "packet_length" INTEGER /* Length of the packet in bytes */,
  "packet_protocol" TEXT /* Protocol used to transmit the packet (e.g., TCP, UDP) */,
  "packet_timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the packet was transmitted */,
  "source_ip" TEXT /* Source IP address of the packet */,
  "destination_ip" TEXT /* Destination IP address of the packet */,
  "source_port" INTEGER /* Source port of the packet */,
  "destination_port" INTEGER /* Destination port of the packet */,
  "analysis_result" TEXT /* Result of the packet analysis (e.g., normal, suspicious) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analysis_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "flow_analysis" (
  "analysis_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analysis result */,
  "flow_id" TEXT /* ID of the flow analyzed */,
  "flow_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the flow in seconds */,
  "flow_protocol" TEXT /* Protocol used to transmit the flow (e.g., TCP, UDP) */,
  "flow_timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the flow was transmitted */,
  "source_ip" TEXT /* Source IP address of the flow */,
  "destination_ip" TEXT /* Destination IP address of the flow */,
  "source_port" INTEGER /* Source port of the flow */,
  "destination_port" INTEGER /* Destination port of the flow */,
  "analysis_result" TEXT /* Result of the flow analysis (e.g., normal, suspicious) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analysis_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_flow_analysis_flow_id FOREIGN KEY ("flow_id") REFERENCES flows ("flow_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "packet_id" INTEGER /* ID of the packet that triggered the alert */,
  "alert_timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the alert was triggered */,
  "alert_description" TEXT /* Description of the alert */,
  "alert_type" TEXT /* Type of the alert (e.g., security, congestion) */,
  "alert_severity" TEXT /* Severity of the alert (e.g., low, medium, high) */,
  "alert_source" TEXT /* Source of the alert (e.g., device, flow) */,
  "alert_action" TEXT /* Action taken in response to the alert (e.g., investigate, block) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the network data */,
  "access_timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the access occurred */,
  "access_description" TEXT /* Description of the access event */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., read, write) */,
  "access_object" TEXT /* Object accessed (e.g., packet, flow) */,
  "access_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the access in seconds */,
  "access_result" TEXT /* Result of the access (e.g., success, failure) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
